subject: A large crustacean-like Eldrazi creature emerges from dark water beside the wreck of a sailing ship under a full moon
description: A massive crab or crustacean-like creature with multiple fin-like appendages rises from dark water at left, its silhouette looming against a full moon in the upper center of the frame. To the right, the mast and rigging of a wrecked sailing ship are visible, their lines and spars tangled. Flocks of birds scatter in the dark blue sky around the moon. The image is rendered almost entirely in dark blue and blue-grey, with the moon providing the primary light source. The composition creates a sense of a ship encountering — or already having been overcome by — the creature.
foreground: Eldrazi crustacean creature rising from water, dark silhouette
background: full moon, dark blue sky, scattered birds, ruined sailing ship rigging
emotion: dread, the sea as void — a ship-wreck moment already passed, the monster already arrived
